prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-LBLH-ACACIAPASTASPOON-1PC Product Type: SPOON Brand (from catalog): LABREA LIFE + HOME Existing Title: Labrea Life + Home 1pc Solid Acacia Wooden Spoon for Pasta Home Essentials, 11 Inch Description: In opposition to harsh metal or manufactured silicone kitchen utensils, opt for a more a natural option in your kitchen with Labrea Life + Homes Solid Acacia Wood Spaghetti Spoon.

This wooden pasta spoon is firstly and importantly, food safe for all meal prep, cooking, baking, tasting and serving; furthermore, the wooden spoons won’t scratch or mark your pots and pans like other kitchen utensils can, especially where ceramic and non stick cookware or bakeware are concerned.

Meeting at the corner of function and form, this classic wooden spaghetti spoon or pasta spoon features a comfortable, rounded handle for ease of use when stirring or mixing, soft, smooth edges, a balanced weight and natural wood grain finish. Perfect for serving up spaghetti, linguine, angel hair pasta or any other types of noodles, you’ll reach for this home essentials item on every pasta night to come.

Featuring a classic and simple design, we love this wooden spoon not only for its timelessness and quality material construction, but for the welcomed dose of soft and organic visual texture. Functional, stylish and reliable, this wooden pasta serving spoon will be a great addition to top drawer tools or countertop utensil crock.

PLEASE NOTE: Wooden spoons may vary in color and grain striations, due to the natural acacia wood material construction of these kitchen utensils

CARE INSTRUCTIONS: Hand wash only; Remove excess water after hand washing and leave to air dry Search Terms: wooden kitchen utensil set cooking baking food meal prep serveware wedding house warming gifts new home chef restaurant equipment bakeware kitchen gadgets wooden spoon farmhouse tablescape home decor acacia wood utensils home essentials pasta spoon Features: - NATURAL WOOD GRAIN: Please note that items may vary in color and grain due to the natural acacia wood material of wooden kitchen utensils - FOOD SAFE KITCHEN UTENSILS: Natural acacia wooden cooking spoon is safe for all food and meal prep, cooking and baking; the wooden cooking spoon is safe to use with ceramic or non stick pots, pans and other cookware - SPAGHETTI SPOON: Classic spaghetti spoon or pasta spoon features comfortable rounded handles, soft edges and natural wood grain; ideal for cooking and serving spaghetti, linguine, angel hair pasta or any other kind of noodles - KITCHEN ESSENTIALS: Solid acacia wood pasta spoon is a must have kitchen essentials item you’ll reach for time and time again on pasta night; in addition to the cooking spoons practicality in the kitchen, it also adds a welcomed dose of organic visual texture to any countertop - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 11 x 2.5 x 0.5 inches; Weight: 0.10lbs; Dishwasher Safe: No === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Labrea Life + Home 11 Inch Solid Acacia Wooden Pasta Spoon

openai.item_name: LABREA LIFE + HOME 1-pc 11 in Acacia Wooden Pasta Spoon

anthropic.title_differentiation: Natural Acacia Wood, Food Safe, Non-Scratch, Comfortable Rounded Handle, Hand Wash Only

openai.title_differentiation: Food Safe Acacia Wood, Won't Scratch Non Stick Cookware, Comfortable Rounded Handle, Natural Grain Finish, Hand Wash Only
